title: Explosify
description: With this Data Pack all of the TNTs get more powerful when placed. You can change the explosion radius in a settings page.
body:
## Introducing Explosify!
The Data Pack changes the TNTs behaviour. When placing or lighting it nothing different will happen at first. That's because you need to change the explosion radius in the settings. By typing ``` /function explosify:settings ``` you will get a book. Change the settings and you're good to go! Place the TNT and see the 'wonder' hapen itself. 
## Why Explosify?
The data pack was made because sometimes you have the urge to just destroy and blow something up. It can feel satisfying...
## Support or Issues?
This is my first data pack, so sorry if there are bugs 😅. If you have any problems, feature suggestions or other you can join my helpful [Discord](https://discord.gg/XGxBGrJjkA).
### Thanks
Big thanks to [Legitimoose/Legitermoose](https://www.youtube.com/c/Legitimoose) for helpful tutorials.
